title: 'YES! Come play!' — group welcome (Nano Banana group-shot locked, v2)
preRenderNote: Composition is anchored by the Nano Banana 3-character group still (group_ep13_clip16_welcome.png). Sara (pink helmet, arms wide welcoming), Eva (teal helmet, hands cupped at mouth), Isabel (no helmet, hands clasped at chest, distinctively brunette curly hair). Locks the count at exactly 3 + visual differentiators (helmets vs no helmet, blonde vs brunette).
prompt: Composition is anchored by @ep13-clip16-group. Animate the still gently — soft smiles widening, gentle in-place sway, hands move softly. POSITION LOCK — every figure stays in their EXACT spot from the still throughout the entire 10s. Exactly THREE people in the entire frame, no extras, no additional kids spawned. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara (warm cheerful kid-voice, sing-song bright): "YES! Come play with us!" Eva (cheerful sing-song call): "We have a tennis ball! Catch it with us!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Isabel (kind kindergartener voice, warm and shy with delight): "Yay! Thank you! What do we play first?" Sara (cheerful kid-voice): "TAG! Everyone's IT!" Calm cheerful warm kid-show family ambiance throughout. Each figure stays in their locked still pose — no walking, no leaping, no jumping, no extras spawning.
